title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
